This spec defines the My API.

Introduction

Some introductory text.

Notes look like this.

The Foo interface

        [Exposed=Window]
        interface Foo {
          attribute DOMString bar;
          undefined doTheFoo();
        };

The Foo interface represents a {{Foo}}.

The doTheFoo() method does the foo. Call it via {{Foo/doTheFoo()}}.

  1. Let |result:DOMString| be a new string.
  2. Return |result|.
